name: @local/freeform
description: Build forms, collect submissions, and send notifications directly from EmDash.

scripts.build: mkdir -p .tmp && TMPDIR="$(pwd)/.tmp" emdash-plugin build && tsdown src/index.ts --format esm --outDir dist --dts false
scripts.build:watch: tsdown src/index.ts src/sandbox-entry.ts --format esm --outDir dist --dts false --watch
